aweme_list.desc: Ответ пользователю @Bankrot2000 Как открыть счет в ЕС банках #wise, #Revolut, #BlackCatCard, Gekkard…

Things that just make sense about my office, because why settle for a basic workspace when you can have all this? A gym to break a sweat, a sauna because, well… Estonia, and massage chairs for that mid-day reset. Wellness room for when you need a breather, a parent room because work-life balance actually exists, and themed kitchen spaces stocked with cereal cans (yes, every kitchen!), plus a whole corner dedicated to snacks, fruits, and veggies. Need a break? There’s table tennis, a PS5 box, and even a chess set with currency pieces (because money moves, literally). And let’s not forget the aesthetically pleasing meeting rooms that make even long meetings bearable. Wise truly understood the assignment! #officeperks #WiseTallinn #workbutmakeitfun #office #Wise #explore #officespace
